text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
Sudden drowsiness detected due to failing
operation "sheep count."
choice_data_list:
Do you mean counting sheep until you fall
asleep?

Do you mean counting sheep until you fall
asleep?

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
Affirmative. For some reason, the method my
father taught me is not executing effectively.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
A sheep does one leg press, and proceeds onto
two forward lunges.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
Once the sheep completes 21,600 hip
extensions, it's time to wake up.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
However, considering the burden on the sheep,
perhaps swimming would have been a better
choice of exercise.

In her own way, she seems genuinely concerned
about her inability to sleep.
